title: Phase 10: Benchmarks & Visualization
description: Primary deliverable. Pluggable fixture generation (social_media, ecommerce, complex_hierarchy profiles), load-time/query-time/cache/concurrency/memory benchmarks, SVG chart visualization, regression detection. See Vision.md for full details.
